offer: For law firms processing 5–15 compliance reports/month, delays in report generation cause potential penalties. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for law firm tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
